source_pr.title: pkg/planner: fix unstable index advisor TPCH tests
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #62455

Problem Summary:
- `TestIndexAdvisorTPCH*` could be flaky on slow CI due to advisor timeouts.

### What changed and how does it work?
- Pass an explicit `timeout=2m` option to index advisor in TPCH tests.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

Test Details:
- `go test -run ^TestIndexAdvisorTPCH1$ -count=5 --tags=intest ./pkg/planner/indexadvisor`
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: er: close #62455  Problem Summary: - `TestIndexAdvisorTPCH*` could be flaky on slow CI due to advisor timeouts.  ### What changed and how does it work? - Pass an exp
failure_signature: er: close #62455  Problem Summary: - `TestIndexAdvisorTPCH*` could be flaky on slow CI due to advisor timeouts.  ### What changed and how does it work? - Pass an exp
root_cause_explanation: Index advisor TPCH tests could time out under CI load because the advisor performs expensive analysis with a default timeout. This PR sets an explicit longer timeout option (2m) for `AdviseIndexes`, preventing timing-related flakes.
fix_pattern: er: close #62455  Problem Summary: - `TestIndexAdvisorTPCH*` could be flaky on slow CI due to advisor timeouts.  ### What changed and how does it work? - Pass an exp
